msgid: Web based tool to extract numerical data from plots and graph images.
msgstr: 基于 Web 的工具，用于从图表和图像中提取数值数据。
正在加载应用程序，请稍候...

msgid: Problems loading? Make sure you have a recent version of Google Chrome, Firefox, Safari or Microsoft Edge installed.
msgstr: 加载有问题？请确保已安装较新版本的 Google Chrome、Firefox、Safari 或 Microsoft Edge。

source: templates/_popups.html:43; templates/_popups.html:77; templates/_popups.html:88; templates/_popups.html:96; templates/_popups.html:205; templates/_popups.html:219; templates/_popups.html:275; templates/_popups.html:288; templates/_popups.html:302; templates/_popups.html:317; templates/_popups.html:329; templates/_popups.html:340; templates/_popups.html:350; templates/_popups.html:361; templates/_popups.html:393; templates/_popups.html:443; templates/_popups.html:514; templates/_popups.html:530; templates/_popups.html:555; templates/_strings.html:95

msgid: Load a Javascript file to further extend the capabilities of WebPlotDigitizer.
msgstr: 加载一个 JavaScript 文件，以进一步扩展 WebPlotDigitizer 的功能。

source: templates/_popups.html:105; templates/_popups.html:274; templates/_popups.html:287; templates/_popups.html:301; templates/_popups.html:373; templates/_popups.html:540; templates/_strings.html:94

msgid: *Plotly is a secure data analysis and graphing site with data sharing and access controls.
msgstr: *Plotly 是一个安全的数据分析和绘图网站，提供数据共享和访问控制。
WebPlotDigitizer - 从图表中提取数据
导出 JSON 或项目文件

msgid: Export a JSON file containing the axes calibrations, digitized data and measurements. This JSON file can be loaded to resume work at a later time. You can also download a combined 'project file' which includes this JSON and also the image in a single TAR file.
msgstr: 导出包含坐标轴标定、数字化数据和测量结果的 JSON 文件。该 JSON 文件可在以后加载，以继续之前的工作。你也可以下载合并的“项目文件”，它会把该 JSON 和图像一起打包到一个 TAR 文件中。

msgid: Load a previously exported JSON or project file (.tar)
msgstr: 加载之前导出的 JSON 或项目文件（.tar）

msgid: (Note: This will clear any unsaved data in the current plot.)
msgstr: （注意：这会清除当前图中的所有未保存数据。）

msgid: Click to select a data point. The following keys can then be used to adjust the position
msgstr: 单击选择一个数据点。随后可使用以下按键调整位置
向上/向下/向右/向左移动

msgid: Click on four corners of the region to be transformed as shown.
msgstr: 请按图示单击待变换区域的四个角。

msgid: Do you wish to tweak existing axes calibration or select a new axes type?
msgstr: 你要微调现有坐标轴标定，还是选择新的坐标轴类型？
导出所有数据集中的数据

msgid: Relabel the current page number with an alphanumeric string. Optionally, relabel all page numbers in the image based on the current page (only supports integer values).
msgstr: 用字母数字字符串重新标记当前页码。也可以基于当前页重新标记图像中的所有页码（仅支持整数值）。

msgid: Point groups are groups of related data points such as standard error or confidence intervals.
msgstr: 点组是一组相关数据点，例如标准误差或置信区间。

msgid: To define a point group, enter a name in the text input below. Create additional point groups as necessary.
msgstr: 要定义点组，请在下面的文本输入框中输入名称。可根据需要创建更多点组。

msgid: E.g. Assume we have 3 point groups defined: Median, Standard error +1, and Standard error -1. Points would be entered in the order shown in the image to the right. For each set of points, the median value would first be recorded, then the standard error +1, and finally the standard error -1. The process would repeat for the next set of points.
msgstr: 例如：假设已定义 3 个点组：中位数、标准误差 +1、标准误差 -1。应按右侧图像所示顺序输入点。对于每一组点，先记录中位数，再记录标准误差 +1，最后记录标准误差 -1。之后对下一组点重复此过程。

msgid: Click four known points on the axes in the <font color="red">order shown in red</font>. Two on the X axis (X1, X2) and two on the Y axis (Y1, Y2)
msgstr: 请按<font color="red">红色标示顺序</font>单击坐标轴上的四个已知点：X 轴上两个点（X1、X2），Y 轴上两个点（Y1、Y2）。

msgid: Click on two known points (P1, P2) on the continuous axes along the bars
msgstr: 在条形对应的连续坐标轴上单击两个已知点（P1、P2）。

msgid: Click on the center, followed by two known points.
msgstr: 先单击中心点，然后单击两个已知点。

msgid: Click on the two ends of the scale bar on the map.
msgstr: 单击地图比例尺的两个端点。

msgid: Click on the three corners in the order shown above.
msgstr: 按上图所示顺序单击三个顶点。

msgid: Click on five points on the chart axes as shown:
msgstr: 请按图示在图表坐标轴上单击五个点：

msgid: First three points at different radial positions but the same known time (T0).
msgstr: 前三个点位于不同半径位置，但对应同一已知时间（T0）。

msgid: Next two points on any times (T1, T2) but at the same radial position as R2.
msgstr: 后两个点可位于任意时间（T1、T2），但半径位置须与 R2 相同。

msgid: AI assist is an experimental feature that uses state-of-the-art multimodal AI models on your image to auto detect axes information and datasets. This feature is under active development and more capabilities will be added soon.
msgstr: AI 辅助是一项实验性功能，会使用先进的多模态 AI 模型分析你的图像，并自动检测坐标轴信息和数据集。该功能仍在积极开发中，后续会增加更多能力。

msgid: Click run to attempt auto-generating Axes and Datasets for your image.
msgstr: 单击“运行”，尝试为你的图像自动生成坐标轴和数据集。

msgid: Specify X values for data extraction, for example
msgstr: 指定用于数据提取的 X 值，例如

msgid: Note: You may need to hard-reload this page after saving changes
msgstr: 注意：保存更改后，你可能需要强制刷新此页面

msgid: Click points to select and use cursor keys to adjust positions. Use Shift+Arrow for faster movement. Click complete when finished.
msgstr: 单击点以选择，并使用方向键调整位置。使用 Shift+方向键可加快移动速度。完成后单击“完成”。

msgid: Pick a color from the image
Press Enter or Esc key to complete the polygon
msgstr: 按 Enter 或 Esc 键完成多边形

msgid: You are using a beta version of WebPlotDigitizer. There may be some issues with the software that are expected.
msgstr: 你正在使用 WebPlotDigitizer 的测试版本。软件可能存在一些预期内的问题。

msgid: Please enter valid values for calibration.
Values on a log scale axis can not be zero as log(0) is undefined. Please enter a non-zero value.
msgstr: 对数坐标轴上的值不能为零，因为 log(0) 未定义。请输入非零值。

msgid: Please calibrate the axes before acquiring data.
msgstr: 请先标定坐标轴，再采集数据。

msgid: This will delete all data points and point group definitions from this dataset
msgstr: 这会删除该数据集中的所有数据点和点组定义。

msgid: Your browser does not support webcam capture using HTML5 APIs. A recent version of Google Chrome is recommended.
msgstr: 你的浏览器不支持使用 HTML5 API 进行摄像头采集。建议使用较新版本的 Google Chrome。

msgid: Transformation equations are available only after axes have been calibrated.
msgstr: 只有在坐标轴完成标定后，才可使用变换方程。

msgid: This feature has not been implemented in the current version. This may be available in a future release.
msgstr: 当前版本尚未实现此功能。未来版本可能会提供。

msgid: Please load a valid image file. Common image formats such as JPG, PNG, BMP, GIF etc. should work. Word documents are not accepted.
msgstr: 请加载有效的图像文件。常见图像格式如 JPG、PNG、BMP、GIF 等应可使用。不接受 Word 文档。

msgid: Please calibrate the axes before managing datasets.
msgstr: 请先标定坐标轴，再管理数据集。

msgid: Are you sure you want to delete this dataset?
msgstr: 确定要删除此数据集吗？

msgid: Delete all datasets associated with this axes?
msgstr: 删除与此坐标轴关联的所有数据集？

msgid: Are you sure you want to delete this axes?
msgstr: 确定要删除此坐标轴吗？

msgid: Please add some data before exporting.
msgstr: 请先添加一些数据，再导出。
错误：没有可导出的数据集！

msgid: Dataset with this name already exists. Please pick a different name.
msgstr: 此名称的数据集已存在。请选择其他名称。

msgid: Axes with this name already exists. Please pick a different name.
msgstr: 此名称的坐标轴已存在。请选择其他名称。

msgid: Specify a valid number of datasets to add!
msgstr: 请指定有效的数据集数量！

source: templates/_strings.html:72; templates/_tree.html:34; templates/_tree.html:44; templates/_tree.html:71; templates/_tree.html:86; templates/_tree.html:103

msgid: Assign an axes calibration to this dataset!
msgstr: 请为此数据集指定坐标轴标定！

msgid: Not a valid project file format!
msgstr: 不是有效的项目文件格式！

msgid: Delete all points in the tuple?
msgstr: 删除该元组中的所有点？

msgid: Delete all points in deleted groups?
msgstr: 删除被删除组中的所有点？

msgid: AI Assist failed! Please try again later.
msgstr: AI 辅助失败！请稍后重试。
